shape.prop:
Channel Relaunch

Reposition from "random tech videos" to a focused weekly show on creative tools.

Target: 10k subs in 90 days.

Content pillars

  • Tool deep-dives
  • Workflow teardowns
  • "Build with me" sessions

Cadence

One long-form video every Tuesday, plus two shorts midweek repurposed from it.

First month

  1. My new editing setup
  2. 3 tools that replaced 10
  3. Editing a video start to finish
  4. Q&A: going full-time

Branding

New intro (<2s), a consistent thumbnail grid, and a brand-blue accent across every frame.
